Video.summary: Step back to one of the most important yet overlooked periods in human history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Achievements of the Islamic Golden Age
Video.title: From Camels to Stars in the Middle East

Image.alt: From Camels to Stars in the Middle East
From Camels to Stars in the Middle East
From Camels to Stars in the Middle East

Video.summary: Trace Ibn Battuta's journey across Northern Africa and the Middle East after the sack of Baghdad.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Achievements of the Islamic Golden Age
Video.title: Ibn Battuta's Search for Knowledge

Video.summary: Get to know the great Caliph Harun al-Rashid and Baghdad's House of Wisdom.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Achievements of the Islamic Golden Age
Video.title: Arabian NightsĀCaliph: Harun al-Rashid

Video.summary: Uncover the origins of Arabic writing before turning to the life and works of al-Jahiz.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Achievements of the Islamic Golden Age
Video.title: The Arab World's Greatest Writer: al-Jahiz

Image.alt: The Arab World's Greatest Writer: al-Jahiz
The Arab World's Greatest Writer: al-Jahiz
The Arab World's Greatest Writer: al-Jahiz

Video.summary: Understand how we uncover ancient historical knowledge, and why Mesopotamia's "rediscovery" is so valuable.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Mesopotamia: Life in the Cradle of Civilization
Video.title: Uncovering Near Eastern Civilization

Video.summary: Discover the surprising theories about the transition from a hunter-gatherer lifestyle to agriculture.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Mesopotamia: Life in the Cradle of Civilization
Video.title: Natufian Villagers and Early Settlements

Video.summary: In this episode, plunge into everyday life in Neolithic Mesopotamia.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Mesopotamia: Life in the Cradle of Civilization
Video.title: Neolithic Farming, Trading, and Pottery

Video.summary: See how the people of the Ubaid developed irrigation systems, despite a lack of written language.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Mesopotamia: Life in the Cradle of Civilization
Video.title: Eridu and Other Towns in the Ubaid Period

Image.alt: Eridu and Other Towns in the Ubaid Period
Eridu and Other Towns in the Ubaid Period
Eridu and Other Towns in the Ubaid Period

Video.summary: Take a peek at the region's earliest recorded inhabitants, the Canaanites.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Holy Land Revealed
Video.title: The Land of Canaan

Video.summary: What have archaeologists uncovered about the arrival of the Israelites into Canaan?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Holy Land Revealed
Video.title: The Arrival of the Israelites

Video.summary: Survey the topography and layout of perhaps the most important city in religious history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Holy Land Revealed
Video.title: Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City

Image.alt: Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City
Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City
Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City

Video.summary: Grasp the development of biblical Hebrew script, and examine rare examples.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Holy Land Revealed
Video.title: The Jerusalem of David and Solomon

Image.alt: The Jerusalem of David and Solomon
The Jerusalem of David and Solomon
The Jerusalem of David and Solomon

Video.summary: Address some of the basic facts about the New Testament.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The New Testament - An Overview

Video.summary: Explore issues that affect how we understand Paul\'s Epistles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: Paul - Our Earliest Christian Author

Video.summary: Look at some of the major teachings of Paul\'s Epistles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The Pauline Epistles

Video.summary: Consider the problem of forgery in the ancient world.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The Problem of Pseudonymity

Video.summary: Begin by considering the nature of creation stories.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Creation Stories and Why They Matter

Image.alt: Creation Stories and Why They Matter
Creation Stories and Why They Matter
Creation Stories and Why They Matter

Video.summary: Metaphor and symbol are integral to creation stories, as they form a crucial part of the language of myth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Reading Metaphor in Creation Stories

Video.summary: Enuma Elish, also called the Seven Tablets of Creation, is a masterpiece of Mesopotamian literature.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Mesopotamian Creation: Enuma elish

Video.summary: Examine key Mesopotamian texts referencing a catastrophic flood which decimates humanity.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic

Image.alt: The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic
The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic
The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic

Video.summary: Take account of funerary texts that contain allusions to the ancient Egyptian conceptions of creation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Egyptian Gods of Creation

Video.summary: Within ancient Egyptian culture, explore the means by which the gods created the world and humanity.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Egyptian Approaches to Creation

Video.summary: This ancient Syrian text, though it lacks an overt description of creation, resonates with key themes of other creation stories of the ancient Near East.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle

Image.alt: The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle
The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle
The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle

Video.summary: Here, encounter the Hurrians and Hittites, two lesser known but important peoples of the ancient Near East.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle

Image.alt: Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle
Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle
Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle
